text:
Thanks for flagging this — two $200 ACH charges on your bank statement from this morning, but only one showing on your Novig account.

I can't confirm the cause from here, so I'm passing this to our payments team to look into it. It would help if you could reply with the approximate time of the deposit and the last 4 digits of the bank account used, so they can trace both charges.

A human from payments ops will follow up with you directly.

Novig Support
